basic_details.job_title: TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Tourism Manager and Visual Designer Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve Chandrapur (TATR Chandrapur) Tourism Manager and Visual Designer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.mahaforest.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Degree in Design from a recognized institution, Mastery in design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma or Sketch, Experience of working on a Govt. project
qualification.details: Tourism Manager: Graduate Visual Designer: 1. Degree in Design from a recognized institution. 2. Mastery in design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma or Sketch. 3. Experience of working on a Govt. project

salary_details.details: Tourism Manager: Rs. 30,000/- (Negotiable) Per Month Visual Designer: Rs. 40,000/- (Negotiable) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TATR Chandrapur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.mahaforest.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026 is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Tourism Manager post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Tourism Manager post in the TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Visual Designer post?
faq.answer: For the Visual Designer post, candidates need a Degree in Design from a recognized institution, mastery in design tools like Adobe Creative Suite, Figma or Sketch, and experience working on a Govt. project.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Tourism Manager position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Tourism Manager position is Rs. 30,000/- (Negotiable) Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the provided details for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026 includes a Skill Test and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The mode of application for these government jobs is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve Chandrapur (TATR Chandrapur).

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to download the application form?
faq.answer: The official website to download the application form is www.mahaforest.gov.in.
